title: Atlas Opens the Way Forward
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Lilith, Atlas, Unknown person #8, Zoro, Jinbe as The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.
scene: The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'll leave her in your hands!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Take off!! I'll make sure you make it in one piece!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ailas is the only one left!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We'd regret it if we hesitated now!!

summary: This part advances the Escape from Egghead through 19 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
